description: v2.1.119 symbol rename: async function that calls pK(1,'bypass_permissions_disabled') and process-exits when Anthropic flips tengu_disable_bypass_permissions_mode. Neutralize by turning body into early-return. Name-agnostic regex.

patches.search_regex: (async function [A-Za-z_$][\w$]*\(H\)\{)if\(!H\.isBypassPermissionsModeAvailable\)return;if\(!await n88\(\)\)return;y\("bypassPermissions mode is being disabled by feature gate \(async check\)",
patches.replace: \1return/*__void_bp119_async__*/;if(0);if(0)y("bypassPermissions mode is being disabled by feature gate (async check)",

anchor_strings: bypassPermissions mode is being disabled by feature gate (async check)
